text:
There were two cats who couldn't stop chatting.

"Pshaw!" said Purrington.

"Well, look," said Whiskers. "That cat has on a little hat."

"Do I?" cried Whiskers. "I see it! It's my new feather!"

They laughed and scampered after the cat.

"Oh, not me!" Whiskers protested.

But it was.

"You're so silly!" chuckled Whiskers.

They chased the hat-wearing cat around the garden.

Finally, Whiskers caught up with him. They had a tug-of-war!

"Let's see who wins," said Whiskers.

It was a tie!

"I suppose we'll have to race instead," said Whiskers. "You go first."

The cats raced, whooping and laughing. At the cheery finish line, they pawed each other.

"You're always winning," Whiskers admitted.

"Hmph!" retorted Purrington. "You lose all the time."
